_comment: Answers for `databricks bundle init` -> sdp-meta DAB template, scenario D: bronze_silver pipelines reading upstream Delta tables (the typical 'staging table -> bronze -> silver' flavor). Demonstrates source_format=delta + the recipes/from_uc.py mirroring helper. {uc_catalog_name}, {sdp_meta_schema}, {bronze_target_schema}, and {silver_target_schema} are substituted at runtime (driven by --uc-catalog-name and --uc-schema).
author: dab-template-demo
